meaning: n.施工船,工作艇(如渔船等)
examples: Due to special features of workboat, their afloat condition adjustment is very important.
It introduces the method, content and result of cross - sectional model test of light hollow block structure adopted for workboat wharf, which provides reference for design.
This is a very functional yacht with workboat roots and a style not out of place in Monte Carlo.
His company supplied the workboat used in the original offshore construction.
April 20-21: The Damon Bankston, a 285-foot workboat that was ferrying equipment to the Deepwater Horizon, reports it had picked up 110 crew members, three of them critically injured.
